changeSet.author: alexander.stanik@htw-berlin.de
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS REMSFAL.quotations ( issue_id UUID, quotation_id UUID, request_id UUID, project_id UUID, project_owner TEXT, project_care_of TEXT, project_billing_address_1 TEXT, project_billing_address_2 TEXT, project_billing_address_3 TEXT, offerer_id UUID, offered_by TEXT, contractor_id UUID, contractor_name TEXT, organization_id UUID, status TEXT, valid_until TIMESTAMP, created_at TIMESTAMP, modified_at TIMESTAMP, PRIMARY KEY (issue_id, quotation_id) ) WITH CLUSTERING ORDER BY (quotation_id DESC);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS quotations_request_id_idx ON REMSFAL.quotations (request_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS quotations_organization_id_idx ON REMSFAL.quotations (organization_id);
